items.content_html: This is a simple plugin for Obsidian to overwrite the default behavior of toggle checkbox status. Also, it offers a simple way to toggle through frequently used attributes: task states, task tags, highlighted list, etc.
items.title: thingnotok/obsidian-toggle-list: This is a simple plugin for Obsidian to overwrite the default behavior of toggle checkbox status. Also, it offers a simple way to toggle through frequently used attributes: task states, task tags, highlighted list, etc.

items.content_html: Codeblock Customizer plugin for Obsidian

items.content_html: Automatic installation of Termux with shelll, packages, plugins, fonts and theme selection 🧊 XFCE and Debian proot setup 🧊 OhMyTermuxScript setup : a useful collection of scripts ⏯️ OhMyObsidian : Sync Obsidian Android using Termux and Git (SSH) 📑

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin for creating and accessing daily notes for any date. Use command palette shortcuts or a calendar UI to navigate. Features emoji summaries for days, weeks, months, and years
items.title: luiisca/obsidian-periodic-notes-calendar: Obsidian plugin for creating and accessing daily notes for any date. Use command palette shortcuts or a calendar UI to navigate. Features emoji summaries for days, weeks, months, and years

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that automatically link bible verses to YouVersion bible.
items.title: jaanonim/obsidian-youversion-linker: Obsidian plugin that automatically link bible verses to YouVersion bible.

items.content_html: Zotero plugin that links your Markdown database to Zotero. Jump directly from Zotero Items to connected Markdown files. Automatically tags Zotero Items so you can easily see which papers you've made notes for.
items.title: daeh/zotero-markdb-connect: Zotero plugin that links your Markdown database to Zotero. Jump directly from Zotero Items to connected Markdown files. Automatically tags Zotero Items so you can easily see which papers you've made notes for.
